caseStudy.problem: Employees wasted 15+ minutes per query searching through scattered docs, wikis, and databases. Knowledge was siloed, answers were inconsistent, and new hires constantly interrupted colleagues for information that existed somewhere.
constraints: Mixed data: unstructured docs + structured databases
Must avoid hallucination on technical documentation
caseStudy.approach: Built a modular RAG system with two-pass adaptive retrieval (probe collections first, deep-retrieve from relevant ones), hybrid search combining vector embeddings with BM25 lexical matching, cross-encoder neural reranking, and intent-based SQL routing for analytical queries.
outcomes: 30-40% cache hit rate on repetitive organizational queries
New engineers self-serve answers, reduced support interruptions
Single source of truth eliminated conflicting information

challenges.title: Multi-Collection Efficiency
challenges.problem: Querying all 4 collections for every query was slow and noisy.
challenges.solution: Two-pass adaptive retrieval: probe each collection with 3 docs, rank by relevance, deep-retrieve only from promising ones. 60% faster retrieval.

challenges.title: Semantic vs Keyword Trade-off
challenges.problem: Vector search missed exact terms; keyword search missed concepts.
challenges.solution: Hybrid search with RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) combining vector + BM25 scores. 25% improvement in retrieval relevance.

challenges.title: Structured Data Queries
challenges.problem: Users asked analytical questions ('How many tools in category X?') that needed SQL, not document retrieval.
challenges.solution: Intent-based query routing with pattern matching to SQL execution engine. Instant factual answers without hallucination.

principles.title: Data First
principles.description: Start with data reality, not models. Understand what you have before choosing architecture.

principles.title: Boring Works
principles.description: Prefer reliable, well-understood architectures over trendy solutions.

principles.title: Measure First
principles.description: Measure retrieval quality before generation. Evaluation drives improvement.

principles.title: Build to Last
principles.description: Design for maintainability, not demos. Production systems need to evolve.
